segment.source: A responsive feature grid with heading and subheadline: 2, 3, or 4 columns in icon-top, icon-left, or card style; each item has an icon, title, rich-text description, and optional link. Use it for: core capability or service overviews, benefit lists of three or more parallel items, what-we-offer sections. The most flexible feature grid; prefer '3-Column Feature Grid' or '4-Column Feature Grid' only when that fixed layout is wanted.
